TextView.android:text:
Rise and Shine


The secret to getting ahead is getting started.

Today is a clean slate. Whatever challenges you faced yesterday stayed in the past. Your only mission for the next twenty-four hours is to be slightly better than you were when you woke up.

Focus on the Process Results are just the shadow cast by your habits. Don't obsess over the finish line; obsess over the next step. If you are building something, write the next line. If you are training, take the next step.

The Power of Consistency Big breakthroughs are usually just the result of showing up on the days when you didn't feel like it. Discipline will carry you when motivation fades.

Today's Mindset I am capable, I am focused, and I am in control of my effort. I will focus on what I can influence and let go of what I cannot.

One Small Win Identify one task that has been weighing on your mind. Do it first. Clear the path.

Keep going. The world needs what you are working on.
